choice.title: STR_ASK_JOB_2
choice.response: I'm a Sloped Mountain Blues Sister.

choice.title: Uhh, the what sister?
choice.response: We're a band of musicians.

choice.title: A band eh, where are the others?
choice.response: Uhm, they may have gotten lost.

choice.title: Lost where, down here?
choice.response: A bear killed and ate one...

choice.title: Hmm, bears can do that.
choice.response: High heels and stairs got one...

choice.title: Really?
choice.response: One fell in a chasm and drowned...

choice.title: Do you know if there is anyone alive?
choice.response: I don't know about the three others...

choice.title: Three others?
choice.response: They were cornered by a burning monster.

choice.title: Do you mean fire elemental?
choice.response: I don't know, it was big and on fire.

choice.title: Ok, they're dead then. Any others?
choice.response: No, that's it, all seven of us.

choice.title: So, they're dead and you're lost.
choice.response: I suppose so.

choice.title: What should I do with you?
choice.response: Please, take me back to town!

choice.title: I need a musician for my bar, interested?
Fine, I'll take you back to town. (Travel)
choice.response: Thank you so much!

choice.title: Can you play something for me?
choice.response: Uhh, about that...

choice.title: Don't tell me you can't play.
choice.response: Uhm, I can play but I need...

choice.title: What do you need?
choice.response: My notes. I need my notes.

choice.title: Ok, where can I find your notes?
choice.response: At this point they could be anywhere.

choice.title: Alright, I'll keep my eyes open.
choice.response: Thank you again.

choice.title: Could you play something now?
choice.response: I can play Rogue's Ballad.

choices.title: Hi boss, want me to play something?

choice.title: Play the Warrior's Ballad.
choice.response: Hackety slash slash, hackety slash slash...

choice.title: Play the Wizard's Ballad.
choice.response: Burn baby burn, taste my spell power...

choice.title: Play the Rogue's Ballad.
choice.response: Many monsters wish death upon me...
